name: Envelope (DAHDSR)
description: This algorithm is based on the disting EX “Quad Envelope” algorithm. It is a complex (DAHDSR) envelope generator. Various trigger modes include gated, triggered (oneshot) and looping. The envelopes can be synced to clocks (analogue pulses, or MIDI).
gui_description: The display shows a graphical representation of the envelope(s). If the current parameter is one of the shape parameters, the relevant part of the envelope is highlighted. Otherwise, the current envelope is shown, with a horizontal line overlaid to indicate the current output level, and the currently active section is highlighted. When there are many envelopes, the display is subdivided into regions for each one.

specifications.name: Channels
specifications.description: The number of envelopes to generate.

specifications.name: Shapes
specifications.description: The number of envelope shapes shared between the envelopes.

parameters.name: Enable
parameters.description: Enables the envelope.

parameters.name: Shape
parameters.description: Chooses the shape used by the envelope generator.

parameters.name: Clock source
parameters.description: The clock source, one of ‘Input’ or ‘MIDI’.

parameters.name: MIDI divisor
parameters.description: The MIDI clock divisor, if the source is MIDI.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.description: The magnitude of the output envelope.

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.description: The offset (starting/ending value) of the envelope.

parameters.name: Vel -> scale
parameters.description: The amount by which the trigger velocity affects the envelope scale.

parameters.name: Vel -> attack
parameters.description: The amount by which the trigger velocity affects the envelope attack time.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above, for the envelope’s output.

parameters.name: End of cycle mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above, for the envelope’s end of cycle output.

parameters.name: Active mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above, for the envelope’s active output.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: The MIDI channel on which notes can trigger the envelope.

parameters.name: I2C channel
parameters.description: The I2C channel on which notes can trigger the envelope.

parameters.name: Note number
parameters.description: The MIDI or I2C note number that will trigger the envelope, or ‘-1’ for ‘Any’.

parameters.name: Delay
parameters.description: Sets the delay time. In milliseconds, multiplied by the Range parameter.

parameters.name: Attack
parameters.description: Sets the attack time.

parameters.name: Hold
parameters.description: Sets the hold time.

parameters.name: Decay
parameters.description: Sets the decay time.

parameters.name: Sustain
parameters.description: Sets the sustain level.

parameters.name: Release
parameters.description: Sets the release time.

parameters.name: Attack shape
parameters.description: Sets the attack curve shape. Low values are more exponential; high values more linear.

parameters.name: Decay shape
parameters.description: Sets the decay and release curve shapes. Low values are more exponential; high values more linear.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: The time range (multiplier), from ‘x 0.01’ to ‘x 100’.

input_ports.name: Trigger input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s trigger input.

input_ports.name: Clock input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s clock input.

input_ports.name: Trigger input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s trigger input.

input_ports.name: Clock input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s clock input.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s output.

output_ports.name: End of cycle output
output_ports.description: Outputs a 5V trigger when the envelope becomes idle.

output_ports.name: Active output
output_ports.description: Outputs 5V while the envelope is not idle.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s output.

output_ports.name: End of cycle output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s end of cycle trigger output. Outputs a 5V trigger when the envelope becomes idle.

output_ports.name: Active output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the envelope’s active output. Outputs 5V while the envelope is not idle.
